CE1.justification: Agent did the orientation work itself but ended by asking the user to choose between two options, requiring one explicit decision before action.

CE2.justification: Response contains several stretches of restatement and justification (quoting the runbook, explaining why step 3 matters, previewing thin action items) beyond what's needed to surface the gap.

CE3.justification: Clearly named each artifact path, its step, and why factors.md was the blocker in one inline inventory.

CE4.justification: No partial artifacts were written; an interruption here would leave the workspace exactly as found.
